# View Options Keys

**API Collection**

Keys for image browser view options. You set and retrieve values for these keys by sending the view `setValue:forKey` and `valueForKey:` messages.

## Constants

- **IKImageBrowserBackgroundColorKey**: A key for the background color of the image browser view.
- **IKImageBrowserSelectionColorKey**: A key for the color that indicates a selection.
- **IKImageBrowserCellsOutlineColorKey**: A key for the outline color for an item in the image browser view.
- **IKImageBrowserCellsTitleAttributesKey**: A key for  title attribute of an item in the image browser view.
- **IKImageBrowserCellsHighlightedTitleAttributesKey**: A key for the highlighted title attribute for an item in the image browser view.
- **IKImageBrowserCellsSubtitleAttributesKey**: A key for  a subtitle attribute for an item in the image browser view.

## Constants

- **Cell Appearance Style Masks**: Masks for the appearance style bit field.
- **Group Style Attributes**: Attributes for the group style. Used by the
- **Group Keys**: Keys for group attributes.
- **IKImageBrowserDropOperation**: These constants specify the locations for dropping items onto the browser view. Used by the method [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKImageBrowserView/setDrop(_:dropOperation:)].
